category_sources: source_facts.description says mongocli manages MongoDB in the Cloud; official repository describes MongoDB CLI as a terminal interface for MongoDB services.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mongocli; official repository README names the product MongoDB CLI.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official MongoDB CLI documentation URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/mongodb/mongodb-cli, so repo is null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says MongoDB Cloud management; official README says it manages Ops Manager and Cloud Manager from the terminal.
